# Lovetta.ai

AI companion app — entertaining and intimate chat with AI-generated women companions.

Website: https://lovetta.ai

## Features

- Natural conversations with AI companions that remember you
- Up to 3 unique companions, each with their own personality and style
- 20+ personality types or create your own
- AI-generated photos consistent with companion character
- Cross-device notifications — she reaches out to you

## Pages

- / — Landing page with waitlist signup
- /privacy.html — Privacy Policy
- /terms.html — Terms of Service

## Status

Currently in waitlist phase. Join at https://lovetta.ai to be first in line.
